inputs.text:
(masterpiece, best quality, 8K, ultra detailed, photorealistic, cinematic Unreal Engine 5 render, Flux hyper-detailed texture), vertical composition 9:16, medium full shot, slight low angle front symmetrical view, oriental xianxia celestial dreamland, a long connected carved mirror celestial staircase floating above fluffy pink sea of clouds,
The entire staircase, railings and stone pillars are covered with extremely complicated three-dimensional relief patterns, dragon and phoenix carvings, auspicious cloud scrolls, peony twig reliefs, gilded outline carving, high polished mirror step surface, the mirror perfectly reflects the girl's long dress, embroidered shoes, falling peach petals and pink clouds; carved beast head decorations on top of every railing pillar, pink blooming peach branches stretch out on both sides of stairs, countless translucent pink peach petals falling all over the sky, the staircase extends infinitely toward the giant full moon with strong linear perspective,
A slender ancient Chinese girl stands on the central axis of stairs, full body back view only, no facial features visible, extremely long silky black hair decorated with delicate peach blossom jade hairpins, silver tassel hair ornaments and bead hairpieces; wearing extremely luxurious multi-layer pink-white gradient Hanfu, heavy 3D peony and peach blossom embroidery all over the skirt, silver cloud piping on cuffs and hem, sheer flowing wide-sleeve tulle with subtle cloud jacquard, layered translucent gauze fluttering softly; the girl wears exquisite gorgeous pink embroidered cloth shoes on her feet, the shoe surface fully embroidered with peony and peach blossom patterns, decorated with gold thread and tiny pearl inlays, classical gorgeous shoe design, gentle slim figure with slightly spread arms,
A huge complete full moon occupies the upper background, ultra clear crater texture and rugged rock details on lunar surface, tiny twinkling star dots scattered in clear pale blue sky, soft diffused sky light, faint thin Tyndall mist glow, low saturation Morandi soft fog color palette, haze blue collocate with cherry pink, warm-cold gentle color contrast, volumetric mist floating in air, glowing petal particles, slight soft focus blur, grand empty healing ethereal fairy atmosphere, shocking romantic celestial sense, no extra characters, no modern objects, clean pure picture, delicate fabric drape texture, clear carved stone texture, tiny thread details of embroidered shoes, metallic luster of gilded patterns

worst quality, low quality, blurry, pixelated, deformed limbs, multiple people, front face, facial features, eyes, mouth, bare feet, modern shoes, sneakers, high heels, buildings, ground, mountains, text, watermark, UI buttons, mobile interface, cartoon, chibi, hand drawn, oversaturated bright color, messy clutter, broken carving, plastic texture, ugly disfigured body, disconnected floating steps, incomplete moon
